claim_bullets.bullet_text: We'll use the [] notation for keys, it allows us to use any expression as a key, and JavaScript will convert it to a string (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.277-278).
We can use a POJO to make a map from positions to moves (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.277-278).

source_record_text: In the 'Will be represented as' section, the author introduces the notation for keys and the use of POJOs to map positions to moves in the context of a game board representation.
